hero.headline: Ship every release like it is boring.
hero.subtext: Progressive rollouts, automatic rollback, and one timeline for every deploy. Connect your repo in the morning, ship behind a flag by lunch.

items.title: Connect
items.desc: Install the GitHub or GitLab app. {{BRAND}} maps services from your repo topology in under a minute.

items.title: Gate
items.desc: Every merge lands behind a flag. Choose canary cohorts by region, plan tier, or a 1% random slice.

items.title: Watch
items.desc: Error rate, p95 latency, and your own Datadog monitors decide promotion. Humans approve, robots enforce.

items.title: Promote
items.desc: Traffic steps 1% to 25% to 100% on your curve. Any breach reverts in under 30 seconds, then pings Slack.

about.body: PressWorks Studio is a local business built on quality work and word-of-mouth. We keep it simple: show up on time, do it properly, charge fairly. Most of our customers come back — and bring their friends.

items.name: R. Sharma
items.quote: Professional from start to finish. Exactly what was promised, when it was promised.

items.name: A. Fernandes
items.quote: Fair price, quality work. Already recommended them twice.

items.a: Yes — local delivery and pickup slots are available.

items.q: Can I return or exchange items?
items.a: Unused items in original packaging can be exchanged within 7 days.
Tell us what you need — we confirm availability and timing.
